    have : ∀ z : spectrum ℂ a, f z = 0 := by
      intro z
      have hfz : ‖f z‖ ≤ C := hf_bounded z
      have : ‖f z‖ ≤ 0 := le_trans hfz (le_of_lt hneg)
      exact norm_eq_zero.mp (le_antisymm this (norm_nonneg _))
    have hfzero : f = 0 := by
      funext z; simpa using this z
    simp [hfzero, hC, le_of_lt hneg]
  have h_bound_ae :
      ∀ᵐ z ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation, ‖f z‖ ≤ C :=
    Filter.eventually_of_forall hf_bounded
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖
        ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C := by
          exact (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const
            (measurable_norm.mpr hX) hC h_bound_ae
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * C := by
          gcongr
          simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
            (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded (ha := ha) x y)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by ring

by_cases hC : C < 0
  · have hf0 : f = 0 := by
      funext z
      have h₁ : ‖f z‖ ≤ C := hf_bounded z
      have h₂ : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ‖f z‖ := norm_nonneg _
      have : (‖f z‖ : ℝ) ≤ 0 := le_trans h₁ (le_of_lt hC)
      have : ‖f z‖ = 0 := le_antisymm this (by simpa using h₂)
      simpa [norm_eq_zero] using this
    simp [hf0, hC.le, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
  · have hC' : 0 ≤ C := le_of_not_gt hC
    have hvar := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded (ha := ha) x y
    have hmul : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
      have : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
        simpa [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg x), abs_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg y)] using hvar
      nlinarith [this, hC']
    have hint :
        ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖
          ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C := by
      -- bound by total variation and sup-norm bound
      have h' :
          ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖
            ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * (Real.sup (Set.range fun z => ‖f z‖)) := by
        simpa using
          (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_variation_mul_supNorm
            (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) (f := f) hX)
      have hsup : Real.sup (Set.range fun z => ‖f z‖) ≤ C := by
        refine Real.sup_le ?_
        rintro _ ⟨z, rfl⟩
        exact hf_bounded z
      exact le_trans h' (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hsup (by positivity))
    exact le_trans hint hmul

classical
  by_cases hC : C < 0
  · have hf0 : f = 0 := by
      funext z
      have hz : ‖f z‖ ≤ C := hf_bounded z
      have : ‖f z‖ = 0 := by
        have : ‖f z‖ ≤ 0 := le_trans hz (le_of_lt hC)
        exact le_antisymm (le_of_eq (by simp)) (le_trans (le_of_eq (by simp)) this)
      simpa [norm_eq_zero] using this
    subst hf0
    simp
  · have hC0 : 0 ≤ C := le_of_not_gt hC
    have hvar :=
      ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const (μ := (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y)) hX hf_bounded
    have htv :
        (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
      simpa [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg x), abs_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg y)]
        using cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded (ha := ha) x y
    have : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ C * (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) :=
      le_trans hvar (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left htv hC0)
    have : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
      simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this
    exact this

classical
  by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
  · have h_bound_ae : ∀ᵐ z ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation, ‖f z‖ ≤ C :=
      Filter.eventually_of_forall hf_bounded
    have h_integrable :
        ComplexMeasure.Integrable (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) f := by
      refine ComplexMeasure.integrable_of_bound
        (μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) (f := f) (C := C) ?_ hC ?_
      · exact hX
      · exact h_bound_ae
    have h_le :
        ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖
          ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * C := by
      simpa [mul_assoc] using
        ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const
          (μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) (f := f) (C := C) h_integrable hC h_bound_ae
    have h_var :
        (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
      simpa using (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded (ha := ha) x y)
    have := le_trans h_le (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h_var hC)
    simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this
  · have hC' : C < 0 := lt_of_not_ge hC
    have hx : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ := norm_nonneg x
    have hy : 0 ≤ ‖y‖ := norm_nonneg y
    have hxy : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := mul_nonneg hx hy
    have : ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C < 0 := by
      simpa [mul_assoc] using (mul_neg_of_pos_of_neg (show 0 < ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ from lt_of_lt_of_le
        (by simpa using (mul_pos_of_pos_of_pos (lt_of_le_of_ne' hx (by simp)) (lt_of_le_of_ne' hy (by simp))))
        (le_of_eq rfl)) hC')
    have hC0 : C = 0 := by linarith [hf_bounded (x := Classical.choice (by
      simpa using (spectrum.nonempty (A := a)))) , norm_nonneg (f (Classical.choice (by
      simpa using (spectrum.nonempty (A := a))))) ]
    subst hC0
    simp at hC'
